$comment: scripts/Route11Gate2F.asm — Oak's aide: the ITEMFINDER at 30 owned species. (The retired adapter's info text carried doubled apostrophes — a generation artifact; the record is the faithful text.)

commands.name: oaks_aide
args:
There are items on
the ground that
can't be seen. ITEMFINDER will
detect an item
close to you. It can't pinpoint
it, so you have
to look yourself!
